articles.title: How a USB-connected speaker can infect a PC without ever being touched
articles.content: Seller of the Sound Blaster Katana V2X doesn't consider the behavior a vulnerability.
articles.titleZh: 连接USB的扬声器如何在不被触摸的情况下感染PC
articles.contentZh: Sound Blaster Katana V2X的卖家不认为该行为是漏洞。

articles.title: Dashlane explains how attackers managed to download encrypted password vaults
articles.content: By targeting large numbers of users, attackers increased their chances of success.
articles.titleZh: Dashlane解释了攻击者如何设法下载加密密码保管库
articles.contentZh: 通过瞄准大量用户，攻击者增加了他们成功的机会。

articles.title: Can't make sense of Dashlane's vault theft notification? You're not alone.
articles.content: Security advisory leaves out key details. Dashlane maintains complete silence.
articles.titleZh: 无法理解Dashlane的保管库盗窃通知？你并不孤单。
articles.contentZh: 安全警告漏掉了关键细节。Dashlane保持完全安静。

articles.title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
articles.content: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.
articles.titleZh: 数十个红帽软件包通过其官方NPM渠道进行后门
articles.contentZh: 下载受影响的红帽软件包的任何人都应立即进行调查。

articles.title: Hackers likely hijacked over 20,000 Instagram accounts with Meta’s AI chatbot
articles.content: Hackers likely took over 20,225 Instagram accounts using Meta's AI support chatbot, the company confirmed in a notice filed with the state of Maine. In the notice, spotted earlier by Bleeping Computer, Meta blames a "bug" for the exploit that allowed attackers to hijack accounts without two-factor authentication simply by asking the chatbot for a […]
articles.titleZh: 黑客可能通过Meta的AI聊天机器人劫持了超过20,000个Instagram帐户
articles.contentZh: 该公司在向缅因州提交的一份通知中证实，黑客可能使用Meta的人工智能支持聊天机器人接管了20,225个Instagram帐户。在Bleeping Computer早些时候发现的通知中， Meta将这一漏洞归咎于一个“错误” ，该漏洞允许攻击者在没有双因素身份验证的情况下劫持帐户，只需向聊天机器人请求[…]

articles.title: Microsoft’s AI chief says superintelligence is near, but won’t take your job
articles.content: Today I’m talking with Mustafa Suleyman, the CEO of Microsoft AI. And I’m actually going to keep today’s intro short — I’m working from my wife’s family farm this week, as you’ll see in the video, but also this is a real burner of an episode. We covered everything from Mustafa’s approach to training new […]
articles.titleZh: 微软人工智能主管表示，超级智能即将到来，但不会取代你的工作
articles.contentZh: 今天我与微软人工智能首席执行官穆斯塔法·苏莱曼（ Mustafa Suleyman ）交谈。实际上，我将保持今天的介绍简短—正如您将在视频中看到的那样，我本周将在我妻子的家庭农场工作，但这也是一集的真实燃烧器。我们涵盖了从Mustafa的方法到培训新[…]的所有内容
